name: Wall v. Kholi
question: Inmates have one year to file a habeas challenge to their sentence in federal court after conviction. The running of that time is delayed while the conviction is under review in state court. Is the time also tolled while a state court considers an inmate's request for a sentence reduction?
description: A case in which the Court held that the one-year window of time in which an inmate may file a habeas challenge to their sentence in federal court after conviction is delayed while a state court considers an inmate's request for a sentence reduction.
